title: Kalki 2898-AD
tmdbOverview: In the year 2898 AD, around 6000 years after Kurukshetra war, Ashwatthama gears up for his final battle of redemption at the sign of hope in a dystopian world and Bhairava, a wisecracking and self-interested bounty hunter, tired of the perilous life becomes the hurdle in the process.
synopsis: Kalki 2898-AD (2024) is a drama, action and fantasy film from India. It holds a solid 7.0 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a PG-13 certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
